data.body:
USER UX REVIEW (17 items to address before close). Grouped:
LABELING: (3) unify 'when'(criteria)+'if'(step) → one plain-language field, drop 'overlay predicate'; (4) 'Rebar'/'Rebar kind' ambiguous → rename; (6) 'Save to IR' → 'Save to Rebar'; (8) 'mode' ambiguous (findings/structured/text + default); (10) 'model' empty + unclear default/format; (16) bold field labels (separate from help text).
DROPDOWNS: (2) truncate/wrap long prompt descriptions in dropdowns; (7) agent step (notify-reviewer) prompt id is text, should be library dropdown; (9) agent step overlay 'if' is text, should be trigger dropdown.
INSERT PANEL: (5) 'Insert step' persistent → an 'Add' button toggles it, revert to edit on selection; (11) redundant 'New prompt' button + 'Create/edit prompt' section; (14) only prompt/scripted insert options (what about branch/loop/map/batch?); (15) insert provides prompt/script select but no other editable fields for the new step; (17) 'inserted op step' message appears under 'Save prompt' instead of under 'Insert step'.
STRUCTURED EDITORS: (18) maps/arrays edited as single-line text inputs — a map/array should not be a simple text input; provide structured editors (model_ladder list, with: key-value rows).
MISC: (12) 'overwrite if exists' checkbox misaligned with label; (13) prompt-id collision check + notify before save (vs failing on save).
Also Q answered: plan-review uses haiku only as the Pass-1 finder ladder ENTRY (escalates to sonnet/opus); verify/coach use opus; completion uses sonnet.
